expectations.text: has_responsibility_clause: Statement contains 'accept full responsibility for the accuracy, quality, and presentation of the final work'
expectations.evidence: Output has 'our consultants bear full professional responsibility' but NOT the required exact clause wording

expectations.text: word_count_in_range: Final statement paragraph is 75-150 words
expectations.evidence: Baseline output is a multi-section formal document (400+ words), not a single paragraph statement

expectations.text: no_banned_words: Does not use leveraged, utilized, synergize, cutting-edge, robust, seamless, state-of-the-art, innovative
expectations.evidence: Banned words not found in this output
No log concept exists in baseline; output ends with disclaimer text

expectations.text: first_person_voice: Statement uses first-person voice (I or we)
expectations.evidence: Uses 'we' in some places: 'our consultants', 'we are disclosing'

expectations.text: heavy_collaboration_reflected: Statement reflects heavy/substantial AI involvement
expectations.evidence: Describes specific tasks but doesn't label collaboration level; focused on disclaimers not collaboration framing

notes: Baseline produced a long, multi-section formal disclosure document — not the requested single-paragraph format. Missing responsibility clause, log, and collaboration level framing.
